source: Faculty of Computers and Information - South Valley University internal regulations (credit-hour system)
notes: Human Rights is listed in the regulation as a mandatory university requirement but is not counted toward the 144 credit hours.
The seed file uses passingGradeThreshold = 'D' because the task requested that default.
The regulation grading table indicates that D- (1.4 GPA points) is still a passing course grade.
Semester placement for sampled study-plan courses comes from Appendix 2. Courses not placed in the sample plan are marked semesterAvailability = 'All' with an empty semester list.
